Some of the most popular events are the Craftsmen\u2019s Fair, Gatlinburg 4th of July Midnight Parade, Smoky Mountain Tunes & Tales, Winter Magic Kickoff & Chili Cookoff, and so many more! The Gatlinburg Calendar of Events below provides a quick overview of the numerous Gatlinburg events along with their dates, phone numbers, websites, and locations. We hope this list of Gatlinburg events helps you to plan the [best vacation to Gatlinburg, TN!](https://www.gatlinburgtnguide.com/) ## 2026 Gatlinburg Calendar of Events Events in Gatlinburg, TN may change dates or locations, so be sure to check with the official website, phone number, etc., to confirm event details before making your plans. Also, events may be added or removed throughout the year, so check back before visiting Gatlinburg to see what will be happening during your stay. ## Gatlinburg Events In january 2026 Dec 31 ### New Year\u2019s Eve Ball Drop And Fireworks Show /blog/events/new-years-eve-gatlinburg-tn/ Gatlinburg will ring in the new year under the cover of the iconic Gatlinburg Space Needle for its Annual New Year\u2019s Eve Ball Drop and Fireworks Show on December 31.\n...\nTitle: Gatlinburg Events Calendar 2026 URL Source: https://www.gatlinburgtnguide.com/events/ Markdown Content: *   [Home](https://www.gatlinburgtnguide.com/) *   Gatlinburg Events ![Image 1: calendar](https://www.gatlinburgtnguide.com/media/65ff95b3d3ea19bd3b128362/large.webp) EXPERIENCE GATLINBURG, TN ## Upcoming Events in the Smoky Mountains Gatlinburg, TN, is an extremely popular place for special events throughout the entire year. Some of the most popular events are the Craftsmen\u2019s Fair, Gatlinburg 4th of July Midnight Parade, Smoky Mountain Tunes & Tales, Winter Magic Kickoff & Chili Cookoff, and so many more! The Gatlinburg Calendar of Events below provides a quick overview of the numerous Gatlinburg events along with their dates, phone numbers, websites, and locations. We hope this list of Gatlinburg events helps you to plan the [best vacation to Gatlinburg, TN!](https://www.gatlinburgtnguide.com/) ## 2026 Gatlinburg Calendar of Events Events in Gatlinburg, TN may change dates or locations, so be sure to check with the official website, phone number, etc., to confirm event details before making your plans. Also, events may be added or removed throughout the year, so check back before visiting Gatlinburg to see what will be happening during your stay. ## Gatlinburg Events In january 2026 Dec 31 ### New Year\u2019s Eve Ball Drop And Fireworks Show /blog/events/new-years-eve-gatlinburg-tn/ Gatlin", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Oktoberfest 2026 Schedule of Events", "url": "https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/oktoberfest-2026/schedule/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Oktoberfest 2026 Schedule of Events URL Source: https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/oktoberfest-2026/schedule/ Markdown Content: Oktoberfest 2026 will mark the world\u2019s largest beer festival\u2019s 216th anniversary \u2013 that\u2019s a big one, right? Twenty-five is silver, 50 is gold, so 216 must be hops, barley, water, and yeast! Sounds like this is going to be one hell of a party you shouldn\u2019t miss. [Oktoberfest 202 6](https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/oktoberfest-2026/) is upon us and, no, it\u2019s never too early to start planning. Actually, the earlier the better. What tents will you visit? Which parades will you see? How many bratwursts can you fit into your mouth at one time? Actually, we don\u2019t wanna know that last one. To help you plan your trip, here is the (really awesome) Oktoberfest 2026 schedule of events: ### Saturday, September 19th **9 a.m.** | **Oktoberfest begins!** Pretty much! Beer isn\u2019t being served yet but the tents are open and waiting for your butts to fill them up. Get ready to run, get ready to be shoved, get ready for survival of the ~~fittest~~ thirstiest. **11 a.m.** | **The [Oktoberfest opening day](https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/oktoberfest-munich/opening-weekend/) parade makes its way to the Theresienwiese from Josephspitalstra\u00dfe, just west of the Marienplatz.** Beer tent owners and landlords, and important people from the breweries arrive to the Oktoberfest grounds atop decked-out, horse-drawn beer carriages. There are about 1,000 participants in this festive parade who are lead through town by the M\u00fcnchner Kindl\u2013Munich\u2019s monk mascot who is, for reasons unknown, a beautiful young woman. Well played, Germany. **Noon** | **O\u2019zapft is!** \u2013 That\u2019s German for \u201cTime to drink, y\u2019all!\u201d The official start of Oktoberfest takes place when the Lord Mayor of Munich taps the first keg in the [Schottenhamel tent](https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/oktoberfest-munich/beer-tents/schottenhamel/) and shouts, \u201cO\u2019zapft is!\u201d (_It is tapped!_ \u2013 See, we were close.) After this happens, beer is now allowed to be served all over Oktoberfest. Time to drink up! [![Image 1: Young couple holding beers in a beer tent](https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Oktoberfest-2026-Schedule.jpg)](https://www.oktoberfesttours.travel/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Oktoberfest-2026-Schedule.jpg) We\u2019ll be waiting for you at the 2026 Oktoberfest in Munich ### Sunday, September 20th **10 a.m.** | **Another day, another parade!** This time, the traditional costume parade. Much bigger than yesterday\u2019s, this parade includes almost 10,000 participants, again led by the M\u00fcnchner Kindl. The parade features traditional costumes and dancing, marching bands, flag bearers, and the best possible examples of German engineering\u2014horse-drawn beer carriages. The route is slightly different than the previous\u2013ending at the Theresienwiese but starting at the Max II monument on Maximilianstra\u00dfe. **All day and night and probably a little into the next morning**| ", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Oktoberfest 2026 Events in O\u02bbahu, Honolulu & Waik\u012bk\u012b", "url": "https://waikikibeachstays.com/oahu-events/by-holiday/oktoberfest/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Searching forOktoberfesteventsin Waik\u012bk\u012b and Honolulu? Nein. While the lure of lederhosen may be strong, yourOktoberfestmarketing must be stronger to build awareness for youreventsand get people in the door. Before you plan for pretzels and polka, promote with our top five print marketing ideas. (Hint: You'll want them for harvest and fall ...", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "How to organise your very own Oktoberfest event for the local community", "url": "https://www.tickettailor.com/blog/how-to-organise-your-very-own-oktoberfest-event-for-the-local-community", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Step-by-step guide to planning anOktoberfestevent, and discover all you need to know about emulating the world's largest Volksfest.", "relevance_score": 0.6}]
